title: ficaria verna subsp. chrysocephala
intro: Ficaria verna subsp. chrysocephala, also known as Lesser Celandine, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that blooms in early spring and has heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lesser Celandine include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The herbal preparations of Ficaria verna subsp. chrysocephala include tinctures, infusions, and creams, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
